content: VS Code Remote: full IntelliSense/debugging on remote machine via SSH; Dev Containers run VS Code server inside container; Codespaces = managed hosted dev containers; all 3 run extensions on remote host not local; no source code needed locally; files/terminal/debug all remote-proxied. Key pattern: thin client (local) talks to VS Code server (remote), all processing on remote. Combined SSH+Containers for remote Docker workflow. GitHub Codespaces adds browser-only access without SSH.
